# Singapore AI Jobs: AI Exposure Treemap

## About
Interactive visualization of AI automation exposure across ~560 Singapore occupations. Each occupation is scored 0-10 for AI exposure based on task-level analysis.

## Methodology
- Occupations sourced from MOM Occupational Wage Survey 2024 (~560 SSOC-coded occupations)
- Task-level data from SkillsFuture Skills Framework (38 sectors, key tasks per role)
- Each occupation scored by Claude Haiku 4.5 (temperature 0.2) via Anthropic Batch API
- Dual-run averaging for score stability
- Score scale: 0 (no AI impact) to 10 (fully automatable)

## Data Schema
Each occupation includes: title, SSOC code, major group, sector, monthly pay (median, P25, P75), exposure score (0-10), rationale, SkillsFuture tasks, technical skills, SkillsFuture funding status.

## Scoring Scale
- 0-1: Physical, manual labor (cleaner, refuse collector)
- 2-3: Interpersonal + physical (hairdresser, bus driver)
- 4-5: Mixed (nurse, teacher, property agent)
- 6-7: Knowledge work (accountant, HR manager)
- 8-9: Digital/cognitive (software engineer, translator)
- 10: Routine digital (data entry clerk)
